_comment: USP-only approved offer language for family_law vertical. Built from uploaded one-pager (Ugly Sweater Party LLC). No external business context (MyPalette, MetaSill, artist, creator, gallery) authorized without cross_vertical_approval.json bridge.

offer_framing.opening_angle: Denver-area workflow improvement firm reaching out to family law firms
positioning_statements: cleaner intake, less admin, and safer workflow support for family law firms
practical human-reviewed workflow systems for family law practices
founder-led team reducing admin drag without crossing into legal judgment or drafting
offer_framing.call_to_action: brief call to discuss how workflow improvement could serve your firm
offer_framing.offer_context: call to explore fit — no cost, no commitment

pain_point_mapping.consult_scheduling: consult scheduling, intake follow-up, and missing paperwork reminders taking too much manual effort
pain_point_mapping.document_collection: document collection, inbox management, and internal handoffs creating friction across the team
pain_point_mapping.admin_dependency: too much administrative workflow depending on inboxes, staff memory, and repeated manual coordination
pain_point_mapping.intake_friction: reduce intake friction, tighten document collection, support day-to-day administrative workflow

target_client_profile.firm_characteristics: dedicated teams, growing client volume, too much time tied up in consult scheduling, sensitive intake handling, document collection, inbox management, and repeated manual follow-up
target_client_profile.service_area: Denver, Boulder, Longmont, and surrounding areas

process_steps.1_diagnose: Discovery call plus focused review of current workflow, intake friction, document flow, and handoff gaps
process_steps.2_design: Recommend the highest-value fix, confirm scope, and adjust the plan based on client feedback
process_steps.3_build_harden: Implement the solution, hand it off cleanly, and support the team for 2 weeks so it sticks

offer_a.name: Intake + Workflow Review
offer_a.price_rule: never mention $350 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks

offer_b.name: Done-for-You Automation Starter
offer_b.price_rule: never mention $2,500 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks
includes: one automation or human-reviewed assisted process

A_tier_named: workflow improvement for your Denver family law firm
question about your firm's intake and admin workflow
family law firm workflow review — Denver
C_tier_generic: Denver family law firm workflow improvement opportunity
family law firm intake workflow review — Denver
law firm workflow fit call — Denver

body_language_rules.footer_context: founder-led implementation partner for administrative workflow support, human-reviewed systems, and operational cleanup

cta_language.primary_cta: reply to book a free 10-minute discovery call
cta_language.call_recipient: reply to the email to schedule with the co-founder
cta_language.barrier_removal: no cost, no commitment — exploratory call only
cta_language.fee_credit_note: 50% of discovery/audit fee applies toward a build

compliance_disclaimer: administrative workflow support only; not legal advice, legal drafting, or compliance guarantees. Results vary by firm and implementation scope.
why_us_nuance: practical administrative workflow support, careful rollout, and human-reviewed implementation — firms can reduce admin drag without crossing into legal judgment, drafting, or risky black-box automation
author: human_operator_from_uploaded_one_pager
